description: Simple and elegant, these sandals from catwalk epitomise minimalistic class. For those who are not fans of over the top embellishments in their ethnic ensembles, this pair is the right foot-style choice. Wear this with a simple light hued churidhar for maximum impact.UpperThong style straps doubling as a wide strap over the midfoot Net strap with light stone embellishmentsErgonomically designed footbed with mild cushioning for comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with mild heels for better supportshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
